nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. Benefactor, have you come here for that legendary Go game?

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: This humble monk has guarded this place for many years and seen countless masters challenge the game. You carry the aura of Go mastery - surely you've come prepared.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Years ago, I played against Duan Yanqing. Though we reached no conclusion, I gained some insights into the Way of Go. If you're interested, this humble monk can offer some guidance.

options.text: I want to learn 'Zen Enlightenment of Go Mind'
Master, I'd like to play another game with you
What is Zen Enlightenment of Go Mind?

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Zen Buddhism emphasizes 'sudden enlightenment.' In Go, sometimes you must let go of attachments and view the game with a clear mind to see the true opportunity.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: 'Zen Enlightenment of Go Mind' allows you to gain a moment of clarity during the game, see through your opponent's next intention, and find the counter-strategy.

options.text: I'm enlightened! Please teach me, Master

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. Buddhism speaks of cause and effect. Our meeting here is fate. Let this humble monk see your Go skill.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Go is like cultivation - playing Go is cultivating the mind. If you can beat this humble monk, it shows you have gained understanding.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Benefactor, your Go skill is impressive, and more rare is your clear state of mind. In that case, this humble monk will teach you 'Zen Enlightenment of Go Mind.'

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: at crucial moments, empty your mind, observe the game with a meditative heart, and you'll perceive your opponent's intent. Can be used once per game with a 20-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Remember, 'Form is emptiness, emptiness is form.' Sometimes, what seems like a useless move is actually the key to victory.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: If fate allows, benefactor, you should visit Master Yideng. His 'Solar Finger' is exquisitely masterful, and even more wondrous when applied to Go.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your teachings
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged, benefactor. Winning and losing are common matters - what's important is gaining understanding.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Years ago, I played against Duan Yanqing. Though he was the leader of the 'Four Great Villains,' his Go skill was so superb that this humble monk was in awe.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Buddha said, 'Lay down the butcher's knife and become Buddha immediately.' Even villains have hearts that can turn to good. Go is like life - between black and white lies all karma.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: No matter, the time is not yet right. When you're ready, benefactor, this humble monk will be here.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. May benefactor persevere on the path of Go and ultimately succeed.
